result.stdout:
Description:
  Download an HTTP Url.

Usage:
  dot-download [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                  Show detailed log
  -u, --url <url> (REQUIRED)     The target url to download.
  -f, --file <file>              The output file path to save the download result.
  -t, --threads <threads>        Max threads allowed to connects to the download server. [default: 16]
  -b, --block-size <block-size>  The size of block. Default is 4MB. For example, for 100MB file, it will be split to 25 blocks to download in parallel. [default: 4194304]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
  --version                      Show version information
